kicker: INSTITUTIONS · WHERE THE HIGH-RISK MONEY IS

headline.afterNone: — and {{failing}} operate at Deficient or worse.
headline.afterSome: — and {{failing}} operate at Deficient or worse.

lede: The {{name}} concentrates {{money}} in high- and critical-risk contracts — the highest exposure on the federal register. Position on the plate below is the integrity score; stroke height is money at risk.

champions.headline: Honor roll — with reservations
champions.sub: These agencies rank highest on openness, price fairness and vendor diversity. They prove it is possible.

redFlags.headline: Five institutions that failed the test
redFlags.sub: Bottom-ranked agencies. Each one scores below 40 on the five pillars — a verdict of systemic capture risk.

histogram.headline: Score distribution across {{total}} federal institutions
histogram.sub: Every institution fits in one of five bands. The median is {{median}}.
histogram.ariaLabel: Score distribution histogram showing institutions grouped by 20-point score bands

finding.critical: Only {{pct}}% of institutions reach Satisfactory or better. {{failing}} are flagged at the Critical level.
finding.normal: Only {{pct}}% of {{total}} evaluated institutions reach the Satisfactory level or better.

filters.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

scope.label: Scope
scope.disclaimerFederal: Federal scope — the validated federal-administration buyers (IMSS · PEMEX · CFE · secretariats). Grades are absolute, not a curve: no Mexican federal buyer earns 'Excellent' on merit. The Honor Roll and Red Flags exclude institutions with fewer than 30 contracts.
scope.disclaimerSubnational: State and municipal institutions, ranked on their own board — their small samples and locally-set procedures cannot be benchmarked against federal-procurement norms. Never co-mingled with the federal ranking.
scope.disclaimerAll: Every institution in COMPRANET, federal and subnational together. Use the separate boards for comparable rankings.

empty: No institutions match your current filters.
error: Failed to load institution rankings. Please try again.
methodologyFootnote: RUBLI Procurement Health Index v0.8.5 · COMPRANET 2002–2025 · OECD / IMF methodology

exposure.headline: The biggest exposures the integrity score can't see
exposure.sub: Ranked by value flowing through high- and critical-risk contracts — a distinct axis from transparency. Institutions with 100+ contracts.

plate.emptyExcelente: No federal institution reaches this band
plate.unavailableSubnational: The Spectral Register plots only the federal board — state and municipal institutions have incomparable sample sizes and procedures. Switch to Federal scope to see the plate.
plate.unavailableAll: The Spectral Register plots only the federal board. Switch to Federal scope to see the plate.
